topic: A close-up of a Newton's Cradle in motion on a desk, macro view.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: The cradle begins to sway on the desk, captured in a macro close-up from a side-angle.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Spheres collide in mid-motion on the desk, shown in a tight top-down view.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: The end ball swings and returns in slow motion on the desk, captured from a front view macro perspective.
parsed_generation.narration: An intimate macro sequence follows a Newton's Cradle in motion. From a side-angle macro close-up to a top-down collision and finally a front-view slow-motion swing, the eight seconds stay focused on the cradle.

feedback:
The sequence stays focused on a Newton's Cradle in macro close-ups and uses clear shot prompts, but it diverges from the gold standard by starting with motion rather than a static setup with a hand lifting a ball. Use consistent 2–3 second segments and explicit camera angles comparable to the gold standard (e.g., static, close-up, top-down, slow-motion).
